papers_mined.title: Castell Wikipedia Catalan Human Tower
papers_mined.note: Catalan castell: pinya (base ring) + folre + manilles + tronc (trunk levels) + pom de dalt (top three levels of children); built in 2 phases (pinya then upper); UNESCO 2010; motto força equilibri valor seny.

papers_mined.title: Human Towers UNESCO Intangible Heritage
papers_mined.note: Castell social structure: distributed weight ring base + trunk levels + child pom de dalt; ritual building sequence + phase-coordinated rise.

papers_mined.title: Human Towers Catalonia Living UNESCO
papers_mined.note: Pinya foundation distributes weight + softens fall; folre + manilles added for tallest towers; tronc upper levels rise in tight coordination.

papers_mined.title: Museu Casteller Valls Castells
papers_mined.note: Castell phase-coordinated build via Toc de Castells music signal; upper levels ascend rapidly to minimize lower-level weight strain.

papers_mined.title: Survey of Efficient LLM Inference Serving INLG 2025
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: hierarchical attention organization + parallel head processing + layer-stack inference patterns.

papers_mined.title: Attention Heads of LLMs PMC 2025
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: coherence head function + multilingual consistency + hierarchical knowledge storage in FFN.

papers_mined.title: Multi-Head Latent Attention KV Cache
papers_mined.note: LLM-side: MLA latent multi-head sharing + KV bottleneck + parallel head structure.

papers_mined.title: Visual Guide Attention Variants Raschka 2026
